subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God Who hath sent down unto His servants the proof, made manifest unto them the path, and caused them to recognize the Dawning-Place of His Cause, the Dayspring of His verses, and the Source [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی انزل لعباده الدلیل و اظهر لهم السبیل و عرفهم مشرق امره و مطلع آیاته و مصدر
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @Manifestation of God as mediator, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
